theme: Brand & Positioning — hero words-first + banner demote (the banner-vs-words decision)
change_summary: Re-ordered the hero so the manifesto WORDS lead the fold (headline + lead + CTAs + trust line first), demoting the DNA-helix banner to a quieter supporting band BELOW the CTAs (max-width 56rem->44rem, margin-top, shadow-lg->md, opacity 0.92, loading eager->lazy). Implements the doctrine's above-fold law (ONE focus = the words, Hermes pattern) while preserving the on-brand banner asset (which resonates with the 'shared inheritance / DNA' theme).

doctrine_compliance.above_fold_one_focus: now the headline (words-as-focus); banner demoted below = supporting, not competing
doctrine_compliance.lcp: LCP element shifts from the banner image to the text headline (perf-positive)

decision.banner_vs_words: DEMOTE (words lead, banner supports below). Alternatives flagged for operator: (a) keep demoted [chosen], (b) restore banner on top, (c) remove banner entirely (pure manifesto). Operator to confirm at the cycle-2 check-in.

validation.persona_qa: deferred to E1 decadal Reviewer Lens Pass

deploy: deployed to adna.network prod this cycle (manual vercel --prebuilt --prod; per-cycle discipline until auto-deploy)
notes: Cycle 2 of E1. Brand-system v3 token deltas kept minimal this cycle (DarkModeToggle already present); deeper brand tokens fold into later section cycles as needed.
